name: GPT-5.6 Model Router
short_description: Route Codex work to pinned GPT-5.6 agents with bounded autonomy and review gates.
long_description: GPT-5.6 Model Router is a skills-only Codex plugin for explicit, evidence-backed orchestration. One root invocation profiles work, selects a pinned Luna, Terra, or Sol role and reasoning effort, launches bounded waves, re-profiles discovered work, enforces scope and budget limits, and requires independent review for consequential changes. It includes ten managed custom-agent templates, dependency-free routing and task-graph CLIs, versioned schemas, reversible depth-two setup, deterministic completion gates, and runtime route inspection. It has no MCP server, hosted backend, connector, analytics, credentials, or implicit invocation.
starter_prompts: $setup-gpt56-model-router Install and verify the model router agents.
$setup-gpt56-model-router Enable and verify bounded depth-two routing.
$route-gpt56-task Complete this repository task autonomously through the best GPT-5.6 routes, with validation and required review.
$route-gpt56-task Investigate this failure, preserve evidence, and route any discovered repair work to the appropriate agent.
availability: All countries and regions where OpenAI permits plugin distribution
